a85911c2d495.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
a85911c2d495.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
a85911c2d495.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

5cb82ddd8ca3.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5cb82ddd8ca3.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

75db623b7c89.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
75db623b7c89.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
75db623b7c89.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

2af9fdeab1c2.title: Protect the 4.7/5 rating — it took years to build
2af9fdeab1c2.description: With 1372 reviews at 4.7/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
